content.full_text:
City of
HAWAIIAN GARDENS
ROSALIE M. SHER
MAYOR

ESTHER E. FLORES
MAYOR PRO TEM

KATHLEEN M. NAVEJAS
COUNCIL MEMBER

DOMENIC RUGGERI
COUNCIL MEMBER

H. M. "LENNIE" WAGNER
COUNCIL MEMBER

January 31, 1992

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Attn:    Attorney Jill Stecker

RE:  Reference Letter: 91-570
     The City of Hawaiian Gardens
     The Hawaiian Gardens Civic League, Inc.

ADDENDUM NO. 1 TO
REQUEST FOR FORMAL ADVICE


Dear Attorney Jill Stecker:

     Pursuant to our telephone conversation this date,
the following information is submitted as an addendum to
my request of December 20, 1991.

     Initially, I concur with your comment that the
Informal Assistance Letter, File I-90-593, addressed the
issues therein posed in a thorough manner.   However,
since no immunity is provided by same, and additional
facts exist, your further consideration is requested.

     Specifically, the Irving I. Moskowitz Foundation
("Foundation") is immediately contemplating monetary
gifts to the Hawaiian Gardens Civic League ("Civic
League") in excess of One Hundred Thousand Dollars
($100,000.00). Since the Civic League Board is composed
solely of the City Council, concern has been expressed by
the Council to have assurance that when the Foundation

21815 PIONEER BOULEVARD, HAWAIIAN GARDENS CA 90716 • TELEPHONE: (213) 420-2641 FAX: 496-3708

appears before the City Council for any discretionary
entitlements, the City Council will not have a conflict
of interest problem.

Now that the gifts to the Civic League appear to be
a reality rather than a mere possibility the Request for
Formal Assistance is being pursued. In addition, the
Foundation has expressed a great reluctance to donate to
the Civic League absent such assistance.

Thank you for the opportunity to present this
information and your response will be appreciated.

My office address and phone number:

16437 Paramount Boulevard
Paramount, California 90723
(310) 630-5913

Very truly yours,

[signature]

MAURICE F. O'SHEA
City Attorney for the
City of Hawaiian Gardens


MFO/gac




2

embedding.qa_text: January 31, 1992 California Fair Political Practices Commission 428 J Street, Suite 800 Sacramento, California 95804-0807 Attn: Attorney Jill Stecker RE: Reference Letter: 91-570 The City of Hawaiian Gardens The Hawaiian Gardens Civic League, Inc. ADDENDUM NO. 1 TO REQUEST FOR FORMAL ADVICE Dear Attorney Jill Stecker: Pursuant to our telephone conversation this date, the following information is submitted as an addendum to my request of December 20, 1991. Initially, I concur with your comment that the Informal Assistance Letter, File I-90-593, addressed the issues therein posed in a thorough manner. However, since no immunity is provided by same, and additional facts exist, your further consideration is requested. Specifically, the Irving I. Moskowitz Foundation ("Foundation") is immediately contemplating monetary gifts to the Hawaiian Gardens Civic League ("Civic League") in excess of One Hundred Thousand Dollars ($100,000.00). Since the Civic League Board is composed solely of the City Council, concern has been expressed by the Council to have assurance that when the Foundation appears before the City Council for any discretionary entitlements, the City Council will not have a conflict of interest problem. Now that the gifts to the Civic League appear to be a reality rather than a mere possibility the Request for Formal Assistance is being pursued. In addition, the Foundation has expressed a great reluctance to donate to the Civic League absent such assistance. Thank you for the opportunity to present this information and your response will be appreciated. My office address and phone number: 16437 Paramount Boulevard Paramount, California 90723 (310) 630-5913 Very truly yours, [signature] MAURICE F. O'SHEA City Attorney for the City of Hawaiian Gardens MFO/gac
